content:
Song Title: All I Wanna Do
Artist/Band: Sheryl Crow

Written by JC Rea (jcrp_21@hotmail.com)

Tuning: Standard


[Intro]

[tab]           [ch]Bb[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
"Hit it![/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
This ain't no disco[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
It ain't no country club either[/tab]

This is LA!"


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]E[/ch]
"All I wanna do is have a little fun before I die,"[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]D7[/ch]
Says the man next to me out of nowhere[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
 It's apropos of nothing[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
He says his name is William but I'm sure,[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D7[/ch]
He's Bill or Billy or Mac or Buddy[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]
 And he's plain ugly to me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]D7[/ch]
And I wonder if he's ever had a day of fun in his whole life[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
 We are drinking beer at noon on Tuesday[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]D7[/ch]
In a bar that faces a giant car wash[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]   
 The good people of the world are washing their cars[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
On their lunch break, hosing and scrubbing[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D7[/ch]
As best they can in skirts in suits"[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
         "They drive their shiny Datsuns and Buicks[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
          Back to the phone company, the record store too[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
          But they're nothing like Billy and me, cause"[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]
"All I wanna do is have some fun[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]D7[/ch]
I got a feeling I'm not the only one[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]
All I wanna do is have some fun[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D7[/ch]
I got a feeling I'm not the only one[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]
All I wanna do is have some fun[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C7[/ch]                [ch]B7[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
Until the sun comes up over Santa Monica Boulevard"[/tab]


IT'S THE SAME FOR THE REST OF THE SONG


[Outro]

[ch]C7[/ch]  [ch]B7[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]


Comments: jcrp_21@hotmail.com
